grant_title: Maine State Housing Authority Housing Choice Voucher Section 8 Waiting List
geographic_restrictions: Service is restricted to specific counties in Maine (Aroostook, Cumberland, Franklin, Hancock, Kennebec, Knox, Lincoln, Oxford, Penobscot, Piscataquis, Sagadahoc, Somerset, Waldo, Washington, York) and excludes cities such as Augusta, Bangor, Portland, Lewiston, and others.
project_area: Affordable housing and rental assistance through the Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher program
demographic_requirements: Priority given to elderly individuals, persons with disabilities, and people experiencing homelessness.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must be low- or moderate-income households seeking rental housing assistance in Maine. Priority is given to elderly individuals, persons with disabilities, and those experiencing homelessness. Applicants must reside in or be willing to move to eligible counties in Maine.
